{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240930416797C35442729F69F30E"}"},"total":758},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614536542406722329","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很好看，尤其是在描写吕布为了貂蝉跟孙悟空大战几百汇合，但是薛宝钗确实太强了，要不是诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头台，这波m4六倍扫射必死。但我比较心思诸葛亮对花果山108个猴子说的一句话“小伙子一身傲骨，别在你亮哥面前摆谱”，表现出诸葛亮对猴子三棒敲死他的愤慨。总而言之，这本书情节有趣，体系明确，伏笔众多","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":22,"text":"孙悟空","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743158419F69F30E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227614536542406722329%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227587418906717867032%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772900353,"group_id":"7587418906717867032","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"中二的少年变得更中二了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxto9Yhz2epVEWtZprnikl8eFKwJNX+dei6nfh+o8r9j","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d1b5f718ac11429eaf53418bafe20504~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882216&x-signature=OU%2F9oYrSv0dax2iF5fhnNdOCGpU%3D","user_id":"1107920657843679","user_name":"十年吻别"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1107920657843679","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":13,"fan_ranklist_title":"飙子","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1704522200,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587418906717867032","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举+朝堂+种田+架空+日常……】
　　吴狄，字彦祖，穿越者，景和二年文道魁首，天下第一！
　　十六岁少年状元，六元及第，春风得意马蹄疾，一日看尽长安花。
　　锦绣文章自天来，妙笔生花落云台，经史策论惊四座，诗词歌赋压群才。
　　榜眼直呼：“彦祖兄之才何止如此？只不过科举最高只有状元而已。”
　　探花自愧不如：“此言有理，天下才运共一石，彦祖兄独占十二斗，天下倒欠二斗！彦祖兄之才，往后数百年，恐也无人望其项背。在下估计也只能在相貌上略胜三分了！”
　　众人：“呸，真不要脸！其实论帅气，你也不如他！”
　　吴狄：“低调低调，哪有什么文曲星下凡？我比诸位强的也不过是多了个AI罢了。我都有外挂了，你们考不过我很正常！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f4965bce8658718a6476e86897c758e8","author":"清风鱼丸","author_id":"","book_id":"7587418906717867032","book_name":"豆包：科举？我来助你！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e8b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7587419005493723672","read_count":"98554","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1012383"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"432","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,穿越,架空,科举,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7403e6f4fe890f88ca5de35ada3884ee~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779499841&x-signature=Yyh1Iy334s1x2aJ12npj5rGwueo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110736514190","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"506"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240930416797C35442729F69F30E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":84,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":56509,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":79842,"reply_count":13,"show_pv":9308},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613093743251555134","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书堪称鸿篇巨制，其辞章典雅，如珠玑罗列，熠熠生辉。义理深邃，似幽泉探微，引人深思。行文跌宕起伏，若山川之蜿蜒，峰回路转间尽显妙趣。情节编排精巧，犹机杼之织锦，丝丝入扣而浑然天成。书中道理，可启人智慧，可正人心志，真乃世间难得之佳作也！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772566715,"group_id":"7587418906717867032","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"开创新局面
共进新时代
取得新胜利
创下新纪录​","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0QQIH4L7a1njN5iSVhReWU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"800888218191038","user_name":"uiioxx"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"800888218191038","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587418906717867032","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举+朝堂+种田+架空+日常……】
　　吴狄，字彦祖，穿越者，景和二年文道魁首，天下第一！
　　十六岁少年状元，六元及第，春风得意马蹄疾，一日看尽长安花。
　　锦绣文章自天来，妙笔生花落云台，经史策论惊四座，诗词歌赋压群才。
　　榜眼直呼：“彦祖兄之才何止如此？只不过科举最高只有状元而已。”
　　探花自愧不如：“此言有理，天下才运共一石，彦祖兄独占十二斗，天下倒欠二斗！彦祖兄之才，往后数百年，恐也无人望其项背。在下估计也只能在相貌上略胜三分了！”
　　众人：“呸，真不要脸！其实论帅气，你也不如他！”
　　吴狄：“低调低调，哪有什么文曲星下凡？我比诸位强的也不过是多了个AI罢了。我都有外挂了，你们考不过我很正常！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f4965bce8658718a6476e86897c758e8","author":"清风鱼丸","author_id":"","book_id":"7587418906717867032","book_name":"豆包：科举？我来助你！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e8b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7587419005493723672","read_count":"98554","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1012383"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"432","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,穿越,架空,科举,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7403e6f4fe890f88ca5de35ada3884ee~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779499841&x-signature=Yyh1Iy334s1x2aJ12npj5rGwueo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110736514190","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"263"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240930416797C35442729F69F30E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29044,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":5191},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605253087012127550","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错啊！我属于是那种喜欢看快节奏的，主要是刷惯了短视频。但这个确实有吸引力，让我继续阅读下去，文笔也还可以的！作者加油！
优点就是故事的爽点，没有那么老套，是新思路。其次，和我的个人审美观有关。它后面的故事脉络在我认为的好看的框架之下。
缺点就是；虽然爽点可以，但是吧有些地方还是有待优化，再完善一下世界观。
我自个做个推测一下，在这个世界观里应该有春秋战国时期的人物和典故，他应该是一个架空的，在秦朝到汉朝这段时间里。但科技水平可能略高一些(并不明显，也可能一样是我的个人推测。)
总之整体瑕不掩瑜，是一本好书。","text_exts":[{"e":28,"s":25,"text":"短视频","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%9F%AD%E8%A7%86%E9%A2%91&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743158419F69F30E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227605253087012127550%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227587418906717867032%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%9F%AD%E8%A7%86%E9%A2%91%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":180,"s":176,"text":"春秋战国","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%98%A5%E7%A7%8B%E6%88%98%E5%9B%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743158419F69F30E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227605253087012127550%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227587418906717867032%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%98%A5%E7%A7%8B%E6%88%98%E5%9B%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770738116,"group_id":"7587418906717867032","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱好wargame","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+GenDXEEqtB7gLMm5VkB90=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5d2bb11f25244042a3adda5117e2f325~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875762&x-signature=aw2d8qZNJMrshtY9bdWAZQsgKio%3D","user_id":"316249906349869","user_name":"普读"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"316249906349869","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":fa
